title: VMod
body:
## [**Wiki**](https://wiki.valkyrienskies.org/wiki/VMod)
**Also Add Patchouli**

VMod is an addon to Valkyrien Skies that adds a Toolgun - a tool that allows player to make various constraints such as:

* Connection - Creates a Weld/Bearing/Ball Socket like connection between two objects.
* Rope - Creates a rope
* Hydraulics - Extends and retracts when a signal is given
* Physics Rope - A rope that is created from physical components
* Slider - Creates a slider connection
* Sync Rotation - Synchronises rotation of 2 ships

And tools such as:

* Thruster - Create a thruster
* Gravity Changer - Change gravity for a single ship or a whole connected structure.
* Disable Collisions - Will disable collisions between two ships or a ship and a world.
* Schematic - Create schematic of the whole connected structure.
* Scale - Scale not just one ship, but a whole object.
* Strip - Strip VMod constraints either in block radius or all constraints connected to a ship
* Ship Remover - Removes ships
* Mass Changer - Changes total mass of a ship

It's highly inspired by Garry's Mod, so if you've played it before, you will find many similarities to its Toolgun.

 

#### **On Fabric it requires:**
* Valkyrien Skies
* Architectury API
* (Recommended) Forge Config API Port
  
#### **On Forge it requires:**
* Valkyrien Skies
* Architectury API
